calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Paul Valencourt, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Maurice Glass, Sr., Larry Lewis, and Adeline Svaldi.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:
Damages $3,979.80
Interest in total of $425.69
Costs $401.43, for a total of $4,806.92
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
